callback_message: Create users and assign roles such as Accountant or Librarian. Then configure user permissions to restrict access to your institute.
description:
In this step, you will create system users for non-teaching staff such as accountants, librarians, and other administrative personnel.

Start by creating a new user account for each staff member by entering their name, email address, and login details. Once created, assign appropriate roles based on their responsibilities. For example, assign finance-related roles to accountants and library management roles to librarians.

To maintain proper data security and isolation, ensure each user is restricted to your institute by assigning User Permissions linked to the Company. This prevents access to data from other institutes.

By setting up roles and permissions correctly, each staff member will only have access to the features they need, ensuring a secure and well-organized system.

This setup is a critical foundation for running your institute’s administrative operations efficiently.
name: Create Other Staff (Accountant, Librarian)
title: Staff User & Role Setup
